name: RefortifAI
long_description: RefortifAI provides DRM and IP protection for AI models by obfuscating model weights so they only run inside their hardened runtime, letting companies distribute models to untrusted environments without exposing their IP. It works as a drop-in replacement for existing inference engines (vLLM, SGLang, etc.), so customers deploy normally while weights stay protected.
one_liner: Secure Deployment & DRM for AI model providers
